articles.title: Apple leaks four iOS 27 features, including overdue Wallet upgrade
articles.snippet:
As we approach WWDC kicking off in June, we’re learning more about what to expect from iOS 27. A new leak today details four features likely destined for iOS 27, including Apple Intelligence, Wallet, and more.



 more…
articles.ai_summary: As WWDC approaches, leaks reveal four anticipated features for iOS 27, including upgrades to Apple Wallet and new AI functionalities. These updates aim to enhance user experience.
articles.why_it_matters: New features in iOS 27 could significantly improve functionality and user satisfaction.
